creator: rodrigo.freebsd@minasambiente.com.br
text:
I see you filled and worked in some bug reports in the past, thanks for contributing!
Many of them where adressed in 2 ~ 4 days what's a nice thing.
By the other hand after a quick search I see that stunning 20% of your bug reports are just like this one: totally ineffective. The problem with this is it causes extra (not necessary) demand that will _waste_ someone's else time, also other users time while using Bugzilla.
I think I understand how do you feel. My objective here is not to judge but put it in a pragmatic perspective: It's not related to a "behaviour" as you put but conditions. About this I'm sure we can have much better practical results if you decide to consider https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=222515#c1

Thanks
